title: Level Z - Armory
description: A LevelZ Addon for the Armory mod from the RPG series.
body:
A LevelZ Addon for the Armory mod in the RPG series.

This addon adds level requirements for the armor to fit seemlessly with LevelZ. This way you can add this mod to your RPG modpacks without worrying about people skipping progression.

Did I miss something or do you have any further suggestions for other mods I should make compatible? Follow the discord link and let me know!
